title: Romadedi Reindeer Pillar Candle Holder: Set of 2 Large White Antler Tea Light Holders with Tall Glass Hurricane Table Centrepiece Winter Windowsill Decoration Xmas Fireplace
features: Creative Design: Uniquely designed with graceful antlers encircling the glass candle holder, resembling a little deer guarding the flame. It is highly artistic and playful, instantly catching the eye and becoming a standout decorative piece in any room.

Lighting Effects: Centered around the deer motif and combined with transparent glass and an iron base, it offers a simple yet artistic look that complements various home styles. When lit, the light shines through the glass, creating a warm and romantic atmosphere.

Christmas Candle Holder: Perfect for holding tealights or LED candles, it is ideal for candlelit dinners, holiday decorations, and creating a cozy ambiance everyday. The set includes two sizes (large and small), offering flexibility to suit different spaces.

Multi-Scene Application: Suitable not only for Christmas but also for winter-themed parties and gatherings, or for adding a touch of warmth to daily home life. It also makes an ideal gift for friends and family during the holiday season.
Additional Information: Material: Glass and Iron | Small Size: 8*8*12.5cm (LWH), Large Size: 9.5*9.5*15cm (LWH) | Package Includes: A 2-piece set (1 large + 1 small).
